name: gitingest
description: turns a git repo (or URL) into a prompt-ready digest of its contents

developer-org.value: Coderamp Labs (created by Filip Christiansen / cyclotruc)
developer-org.comment: Originally cyclotruc/gitingest by Filip Christiansen; repo now lives under the coderamp-labs org.

implementation-language.comment: Core CLI/library and processing engine are Python (>=3.8); the hosted web UI adds some Jinja/JavaScript, but what you install/run is Python.

first-release.comment: Earliest PyPI release v0.1.1 on 2024-12-22; project went public around late 2024.

website.comment: Official hosted web app; replace 'hub' with 'ingest' in a GitHub URL to get a digest.

github-stars.comment: Repo header displays ~15k stars (1.1k forks) as of 2026-07-09; approximate.

form-factor.comment: Ships as a CLI, an importable Python package, and a hosted web app (gitingest.com); also distributes browser extensions, which have no dedicated form-factor tag.

standalone-usable.comment: Standalone tool; not welded into any single agent.

bundled-host.comment: Not a bundled engine — standalone tool with no host agent/IDE.

install-mechanism.comment: pip/pipx for CLI+library; Docker/compose for self-hosting the web app; also usable directly via the hosted gitingest.com with no install.

retrieval-technique.comment: Serializes the whole repo (respecting .gitignore, with include/exclude and size filters) into a single text digest; no query-time selection, embeddings, or graph.

query-interface.comment: A packer: input is a repo URL/local path plus filters, not a search query.

returns.comment: Output is a (summary, directory tree, file contents) digest with token counts — a single repo blob including a full file tree.

structural-awareness.comment: Treats code as plain text; no tree-sitter/AST/LSP parsing — only file/directory filtering.

chunking-strategy.comment: Concatenates whole files into the digest; no sub-file chunking or embeddings.

reranking.comment: No retrieval ranking stage; it packs everything not excluded.

index-location.comment: Stateless packer — builds no persistent index; produces a digest on demand.

incremental-updates.comment: No index to update; every run regenerates the full digest.

real-time-watch.comment: Manual, on-demand invocation; no file watcher.

vector-store.comment: No embeddings, so no vector store.

mcp-support.comment: No official MCP server; several third-party gitingest MCP wrappers exist (e.g. puravparab/Gitingest-MCP, narumiruna/gitingest-mcp) but are not first-party.

agent-compatibility.comment: Produces model-agnostic text meant to be pasted/fed into any LLM or agent; no first-party agent integration. Community MCP wrappers can expose it to any MCP client.

ide-integrations.comment: CLI in the terminal and the gitingest.com web app; also ships browser extensions (surfaced as web).

language-agnostic.comment: Processes any text-based repository regardless of language; no parser dependency.

code-leaves-machine.comment: The installed CLI/library run fully locally — nothing leaves the machine. The hosted gitingest.com processes repos server-side (typically public repos supplied by URL); self-host with Docker to avoid that.

local-only-option.comment: CLI/library work fully offline on a local path with no external API.

self-hostable.comment: OSS runs locally; the web app self-hosts via the included compose.yml / Docker.

telemetry.comment: The distributed CLI/library carry no telemetry; the hosted gitingest.com web app uses PostHog analytics plus optional Sentry error tracking.

max-repo-scale.comment: Output size is bounded by the target LLM's context — large repos produce unwieldy digests; include/exclude patterns and a max-file-size limit help, but it is not built for monorepo-scale selection. Judgement, checked 2026-07-09.

pricing-model.comment: Free and open source; hosted web app is also free.

maturity.comment: Popular (~15k stars), polished across CLI/library/web/extensions, but still pre-1.0 (v0.3.1) with a deliberately narrow packing scope.

active-maintenance.comment: Latest observed commit was 2025-08-16 and latest release v0.3.1 was 2025-07-31 (commits page fetched 2026-07-09) — both outside the ~90-day window; no more recent activity was visible at check time.

community-size.comment: ~15k stars, browser extensions, and an active Discord; comparable reach to repomix among repo packers.
